title: Looking for Teacher at Arena Animation Capital India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Arena Animation Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Arena Animation Capital India in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Arena Animation Capital India:
Arena Animation Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
